title: Podman Software Configuration
description: Specifies Podman configuration for usage in software management.

registry.title: Podman Registry
registry.description: Represents a remote registry used by Podman.

name.description: The display name of the registry.

scriptName.description: The name used for scripts specific to the registry.

authentication.description: Determines whether requests to the registry must be authenticated.

digestStorage.description: Specifies the mechanism used to store image digests used in version management.

registries.description: Defines the remote registries usable with Podman management.
